content.en:
"So many high-level realm gods snatched this extradimensional object fragment, the supreme forces should not recover these superdimensional object fragments!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

After all, the extradimensional object had turned into a large number of fragments, and what he had obtained was only one of them, which would not cause the greed and anger of the supreme forces.

Moreover, he also traded to the Supreme Forces to absorb the secret art of transcendent dimensions, no matter what the situation, the Supreme Forces would not come to trouble him.

Therefore, this fragment of extradimensional things has completely belonged to him.

Of course, those supreme forces will definitely get more fragments of extradimensional things, that is an inevitable thing.

"The Demon Seed Abyss side is really powerful, and they even joined forces to defeat the extradimensional thing. "

Ye Tian was a little far away from the side of the Demon Seed Abyss before, and he was disturbed by the extradimensional power, so his perception was not very clear.

But he seemed to see that the demon seed abyss side had mobilized extradimensional power.

Perhaps those demon seeds have urged an extradimensional thing and mobilized extradimensional power, so that they can defeat the stump of that extradimensional thing.

After all, only the extradimensional power can be shattered!

"The extra-dimensional thing has been defeated, as for the battle for the extra-dimensional thing, it is a matter between the supreme force and the demon seed at the peak of the abyss, and it has nothing to do with me. "

However, he still asked the Terran Realm Gods at the Boundary Court Headquarters to inquire more about the latest information.

As for him, he was ready to start a retreat, trying to merge with the fragments of this extradimensional object.

According to extradimensional knowledge, the gods of the realm are able to fuse extradimensional things, and once the fusion is successful, they will be able to manipulate superdimensional powers, exert extradimensional means, and their strength will skyrocket a lot.

Therefore, Ye Tian was still eager to be able to fuse this extradimensional object fragment.

But he also knows very well that once the fusion fails, the consequences will definitely be very serious.

However, he didn't care about the damage of the copy body, and even if the copy body fell, it would be fine.

"Then let's start merging.!"

Ye Tian muttered.

The Supreme Force didn't give him the experience of fusing extradimensional things, so he could only grope his way forward.

......

Ye Tian sat in the void deep in the Terran Temple, took out the fragments of the extradimensional object Kun Realm Wood Stump, swallowed it in one gulp, and integrated it into his body.

Immediately, he tried to fuse.

However, a terrifying force erupted.

In an instant, his flesh began to crack, and his body was being transformed into extradimensional.

At this moment, his mind seemed to be sinking.

In just a dozen seconds, he couldn't bear it.

In desperation, he had no choice but to dismantle the replica body.

Wow!

The replica body dissipated, and the Kunjie wood fragment fell to the ground.

Soon, Ye Tian's other copy body came over and picked up this piece of Kun Realm wood fragment.

"Is it so dangerous to fuse the fragments of extradimensional things, I only lasted for more than ten seconds before I could bear it?"

Ye Tian frowned.

Soon, he began to merge again, but this time he cast extradimensional extraction to see if extradimensional absorption would help.

Rumble!!!!

The fusion began, but he immediately cast extradimensional absorption.

This time, he collapsed in less than a dozen seconds and held on for a long time.

However, he still couldn't completely fuse the fragments of extradimensional things, but after holding on for a long time, this body couldn't bear it.

"The extradimensional absorption effect is great, but it is not enough to fuse this extradimensional fragment. It seems that we must continue to perfect the Extradimensional Secret Technique!"

He was very curious, how did the peak realm gods of those supreme forces successfully fuse extradimensional things, could it be that after becoming peak realm gods, it was easier to fuse extradimensional things?

However, there was no other way at the moment, he could only continue to refine the extradimensional absorption first, and then test out the trick of fusion while perfecting it.

And just like that, the years passed.

......

Somewhere in the dark. []

Some of the pinnacle realm gods of the supreme forces have gathered together again.

"Everyone, everyone has obtained the fragments of the Kunjie Wood Stump, do you have any research?"

"One of the pinnacle realm gods of my Ice Realm Gate has never fused extradimensional things before, this time I tried to fuse the Kun Realm Wood Fragments, but I only supported it for a few dozen seconds and couldn't bear it, but fortunately, we pulled the Kun Realm Wood Fragments out of his body in time, which prevented him from falling and dying. But for a long time, his strength has been difficult to recover, and his foundation has been damaged, and it is extremely difficult to recover. Unless he can comprehend the extradimensional power on his own, relying on his own strength to get rid of the influence of extradimensional assimilation. "

"One of my Taiyi Holy Sect's peak realm gods also ended up like the peak realm gods of the Ice Realm Gate, it seems that the peak realm gods still can't fuse medium extra-dimensional things, even if it is a fragment of a medium extra-dimensional thing, it is not something we can refine!"

"If we really master the extradimensional power, we may be able to fuse the remnants of the Kun Realm Wood and thus exert the power of the Kun Realm Wood!"

"'Hehe, if we really grasp the extradimensional power, can we still see the fragments of the Kun Realm Wood?, even if it is the real Kun Realm Wood, we may not be able to see it, and at that time, the only things that will cause us to care about are those rare and powerful medium extradimensional things and high-level extradimensional things!"

"Don't think about it, if we can truly master the superdimensional power, we will have hope to break through to the superdimensional realm, and we can destroy the demon seed abyss with a wave of our hand!"

"The super-dimensional realm, it's too difficult, it's been endless years, and our realm god realm doesn't even have a half-step super-dimensional realm that has mastered the super-dimensional power, let alone the super-dimensional realm, it's too ambitious!"

......

Ye Tian didn't know about the conversations of these peak realm gods.

If he knew that the gods of the Supreme Power Peak Realm who had successfully fused were all low-level extra-dimensional things, and the fragments in his hands were the fragments of medium-level extra-dimensional things, then he would no longer be strange and confused.

Time flies.

Gradually, the years of the 300 million (Manozhao) to the Dao Era passed.

For such a long time, the original battle had already spread.

The high-level leaders of the Boundary Court Headquarters also gradually passed on some information, which also let Ye Tian know.

It turned out that in the original battle, the supreme forces also suffered a lot of losses, and it was rumored that at least three or more peak realm gods alone had fallen, and there were even more peak realm gods who had been hit hard, but the peak demon seeds on the side of the demon seed abyss also had losses.

And those extradimensional things, both sides snatched some of them.

And at this moment, Ye Tian finally knew the name of this extradimensional thing.

Kunjie wood!

Ye Tian has studied and fused the extra-dimensional thing Kun Realm Wood for 300 million to the Dao Era, and he has lost many copy bodies, but he has also perfected the extra-dimensional absorption again and again.

Now, he was about to perfect the extradimensional absorption to the point where it was enough to perfectly refine the Kun Realm Wood.

this day.

Ye Tian finally completely perfected the most perfect extra-dimensional extraction.
